channel.title: AI Unfiltered
channel.description: Chinese AI • Open Source • Security • Incidents. Signal, not noise.

item.title: Network Performance Issues in TLV
item.description: Jun 2, 21:01 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is investigating issues with network performance in TLV colos. We are working to analyze and mitigate this problem. More updates to follow shortly.

item.title: Browser Run
item.description: Jun 2, 19:25 UTC Identified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. Jun 2, 19:18 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is investigating an increased level of errors for customers of Browser Run API. We are working to analyze and mitigate this problem. More updates to follow shortly.

item.title: Gamaredon Exploits WinRAR to Deliver GammaWorm and GammaSteel Against Ukraine
item.description: The Russian hacking group known as Gamaredon has been attributed to the continued exploitation of a WinRAR vulnerability to deliver multiple malware families aimed at data theft and propagation. Per Sekoia, the activity involves the weaponization of CVE-2025-8088, a path traversal flaw in WinRAR,...

item.title: Oracle WebLogic CVE-2024-21182 Added to KEV Catalog After Active Exploitation
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Monday added a high-severity security flaw impacting Oracle WebLogic Server to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog, based on evidence of active exploitation. The vulnerability, CVE-2024-21182 (CVSS score: 7.5), allows...

item.title: GitHub's plan for Agents — Kyle Daigle, GitHub
item.description: GitHub pioneered the modern AI coding era with Copilot, and the resulting explosion in agentic coding has led to notable strains on the most popular developer platform in the world. Here's the plan.

item.title: Cloudflare Access Configuration Delays
item.description: Jun 2, 14:28 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 2, 14:24 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 2, 13:55 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is aware of and investigating issues with Cloudflare Access. Customers may observe delays when making...

item.title: Farewell Ai2
item.description: This was my last week at the Allen Institute for AI (Ai2), where I got the great privilege to work on the Olmo models, to grow, to learn, and to have broad lasting impacts.

item.title: Holo3.1: Fast & Local Computer Use Agents
The Download: AI can run your admin department now
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. How small businesses can leverage AI From accounting to design to market research and product development, there’s a staggering breadth of skills...

item.title: Guest users are experiencing elevated error rate when using ChatGPT conversations.
item.description: Status: InvestigatingWe have identified that Guest users are experiencing errors at an elevated rate when using ChatGPT, we are investigating internally.Affected components Conversations (Degraded performance)

item.title: Network performance issues in US Eastern region
item.description: Jun 2, 12:00 UTC Resolved - Between 13:39 and 14:06 on June 2nd, 2026 Cloudflare identified and mitigated a network performance issue specifically affecting the US Eastern region.Users may have experienced increased latency or intermittent connectivity.

item.title: Elevated errors on Opus 4.6
item.description: Jun 2, 11:49 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 2, 10:42 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 2, 09:33 UTC Update - We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue. Jun 2, 06:39 UTC Identified - The issue has been identified and a fix...

item.title: Oracle WebLogic Vulnerability Exploited in the Wild
item.description: The vulnerability is CVE-2024-21182 and it can be exploited without authentication to hack affected WebLogic servers. The post Oracle WebLogic Vulnerability Exploited in the Wild appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Rehumanizing global health care with agentic AI
item.description: The global health care sector is under increasing strain.  Decades of chronic underinvestment and constraints in recruitment have coincided with a surge in demand for services for aging populations. Gaps in provision are already taking a toll, with fragmented access to care and high rates of...

item.title: Meta AI Hands Over High-Profile Instagram Accounts to Hackers
item.description: Exploiting a confused deputy weakness, the hackers simply asked the chatbot to link the account to a new email address. The post Meta AI Hands Over High-Profile Instagram Accounts to Hackers appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: How Leading Organizations Are Turning EDR Into Operational Resilience
item.description: Most organizations now recognize that endpoint protection alone is no longer sufficient. That's why adoption of endpoint detection and response (EDR) has accelerated rapidly in recent years. Organizations understand that modern attacks move faster, evade traditional prevention controls, and require...

item.title: Supply Chain Attack Hits 32 Red Hat NPM Packages
item.description: Hackers published 96 malicious package versions, injected with a credential-stealing worm similar to Mini Shai-Hulud. The post Supply Chain Attack Hits 32 Red Hat NPM Packages appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Pakistan-Linked SideCopy Targets Afghanistan Finance Ministry with Xeno RAT
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a spear-phishing campaign likely undertaken by the Pakistan-aligned SideCopy group targeting Afghanistan's Ministry of Finance with an open-source remote access trojan called Xeno RAT. "The campaign opens with a spear phishing delivery - a ZIP...

item.title: How small businesses can leverage AI
item.description: This article is from Making AI Work, MIT Technology Review’s limited-run newsletter examining how to apply LLMs across industries. To receive it in your inbox,sign up here. From accounting to design to market research and product development, there’s a staggering breadth of skills needed to run a...

item.title: Dashlane Brute-Force Attack Leads to Limited Encrypted Vault Downloads
item.description: Dashlane’s security systems automatically locked accounts to protect them against the hacking attempts. The post Dashlane Brute-Force Attack Leads to Limited Encrypted Vault Downloads appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: JAKA Robotics Unveils Compact 1.22m Humanoid Robot JAKA Pi for Education and Service
item.description: JAKA Robotics, a Shanghai-based company headquartered in the Minhang District's Dalian Bay innovation hub, has launched the JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot st...

item.title: Oracle’s First Monthly Patches Resolve 77 Vulnerabilities
item.description: Oracle’s monthly Critical Security Patch Update (CSPU) rollouts are meant to deliver critical fixes faster. The post Oracle’s First Monthly Patches Resolve 77 Vulnerabilities appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Insta360 Enters Wireless Microphone Market with Mic Pro Featuring Color E-Ink Display
item.description: Insta360, best known for its action cameras and 360-degree imaging products, has unveiled the Insta360 Mic Pro, a wireless lavalier microphone system that marks...

item.title: Seres Restructures Budget EV Brand into Saidou Technology with ByteDance AI Cockpit
item.description: Seres, the Chinese EV maker best known for its AITO brand co-developed with Huawei, is pivoting its struggling budget strategy by restructuring its loss-making ...

item.title: Customers with traffic using China Network may see an increased in Challenge failures
item.description: Jun 2, 07:16 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 2, 06:08 UTC Identified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. Jun 2, 04:48 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is aware that some customers may see an increased in Challenge failures...

item.title: Brain-Computer Interface Startup SiClink Raises Millions for Visual Reconstruction Technology
item.description: SiClink, an invasive brain-computer interface startup, has closed consecutive seed and angel funding rounds worth millions of yuan, backed by BlueRun Ventures, ...

item.title: Tinci Materials Secures Over 3.4 Million Tons in Long-Term Electrolyte Supply Agreements
item.description: Tinci Materials (002709.SZ), the world's largest lithium battery electrolyte manufacturer, has signed long-term supply agreements totaling over 3.4 million tons...

item.title: Position Paper: Post-Solve Robustness in Decision Engines: Feasible Regions and Smoothness Under Perturbations
item.description: arXiv:2606.00002v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) decision engines routinely output nominally optimal plans for high-stakes industrial systems. Yet deployment rarely matches solve-time assumptions: small perturbations in costs, demands, or resource availability...

item.title: Emergent Collaborative Deliberation in Multi-Model AI Systems: A BFT-Derived Protocol for Epistemic Synthesis
item.description: arXiv:2606.00005v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present the Consilium Protocol, a Byzantine Fault Tolerance-derived architecture for structured multi-model AI deliberation that treats inter-model disagreement as epistemic signal rather than error. The protocol assigns engineered cognitive...

item.title: Deliberative Curation: A Protocol for Multi-Agent Knowledge Bases
item.description: arXiv:2606.00007v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As AI agents transition from isolated tools to collaborative participants in shared knowledge ecosystems, governing collective knowledge curation becomes a critical challenge. Human platform governance mechanisms do not transfer directly: agent...

item.title: Agents on a Tree: Pathwise Coordination for Multi-Objective Molecular Optimization
item.description: arXiv:2606.00008v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multi-objective molecular optimization requires searching vast chemical spaces under conflicting objectives, where early design decisions strongly constrain downstream outcomes. Existing methods typically rely on a single policy or fixed...

item.title: Optimal Transport-based Permutation-Invariant Bayesian Optimization of Offshore Wind Farm Layouts
item.description: arXiv:2606.00009v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Bayesian Optimization (BO) is widely and successfully adopted for solving optimization problems having an expensive-to-evaluate, black-box, and non-convex objective function. However, the vanilla BO algorithm is not able to exploit possible symmetries...

item.title: BitsMoE: Efficient Spectral Energy-Guided Bit Allocation for MoE LLM Quantization
item.description: arXiv:2606.00079v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language models reduce per-token computation through sparse expert activation, but their deployment remains memory-intensive because all expert weights must be kept resident in memory. Existing MoE compression methods...

item.title: DAStatFormer: A Hybrid Multibranch Transformer with Statistical Feature Integration for DAS-Based Pattern Recognitions
item.description: arXiv:2606.00081v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Distributed Acoustic Sensing (DAS) enables large-scale monitoring through optical fibers, but its high dimensionality and complex spatio-temporal patterns make event classification demanding. Existing deep learning approaches-CNNs, recurrent models,...

item.title: Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models with Applications to Overhead Images
item.description: arXiv:2606.00082v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Explainability of deep learning algorithms is critical for computer-vision applications with high-stake decisions. Concept bottleneck models (CBM) have recently shown promising performance to provide explainable and accurate predictions for...

item.title: From Demonstrations to Rewards: Test-Time Prompt Optimization for VLM Reward Models
item.description: arXiv:2606.00083v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning relies on accurate reward functions, which are often hand-crafted or even unavailable in real-world applications, such as robotics. Recent work has explored the zero-shot reasoning capabilities of pre-trained Vision-Language...

item.title: A Shared Valence Axis Across Modern LLMs and Human EEG: The Saturation Regularity
item.description: arXiv:2606.00129v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful representation learners whose internal features increasingly align with human cognition. We study whether modern LLMs can serve as a lens for understanding neural representations in the human...

item.title: DraDDP: A Multimodal Multi-Party Dialogue Discourse Parsing Dataset
item.description: arXiv:2606.00012v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multi-party dialogue discourse parsing aims to identify dependency structures and relation types between utterances in conversations. Previous studies are mostly limited to textual modality or two-party dialogue, failing to meet the multimodal and...

item.title: Toward Robust In-Context Learning: Leveraging Out-of-distribution Proxies for Target Inaccessible Demonstration Retrieval
item.description: arXiv:2606.00014v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Although studies have demonstrated that Large Language Models (LLMs) can perform well on Out-of-Distribution (OOD) tasks, their advantage tends to diminish as the distribution shift becomes more severe. Consequently, researchers aim to retrieve...

item.title: AEyeDE: An Attention-Based Attribution Framework for AI-Generated Text Detection
item.description: arXiv:2606.00016v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Detecting AI-generated text is becoming increasingly challenging as modern language models approach human-level fluency and can evade detectors that rely on surface statistics or likelihood-based signals. We propose \textsc{AEyeDE}, an...

item.title: CSRP: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Chinese Text Correction via Reinforcement Learning with Efficiency-Aware Rewards
item.description: arXiv:2606.00020v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) based Chinese Grammatical Error Correction (CGEC) systems face two critical challenges: general-purpose models lack specialized linguistic priors for subtle grammatical distinctions, and Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with...

item.title: SENSE: Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation for Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding
item.description: arXiv:2606.00021v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Speculative Decoding (SD) accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by employing a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens, which are verified in parallel by the target model, without compromising generation quality. While...

item.title: Dashlane Discloses Brute-Force Attack, Encrypted Vaults of Fewer Than 20 Users Downloaded
item.description: Password manager Dashlane has disclosed that "fewer than" 20 users on the personal subscription plan had their encrypted vaults downloaded following a brute-force attack launched by an unknown party. On May 31, 2026, the company said an "external" threat actor launched a brute-force attack against...

item.title: [AINews] NVIDIA Cosmos 3, Nemotron 3 Ultra, and RTX Spark
item.description: Jensen scores a huge win.

item.title: Delays with Code Scanning and Billing
item.description: Jun 1, 19:27 UTC Update - We are continuing to investigate delayed billing updates, on GitHub.com. We have applied additional mitigations are continuing to see signs of improvement, and are continuing to work to improve the processing rate. We will continue to keep users updated on progress towards...

item.title: Degraded performance for Claude Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Jun 1, 19:06 UTC Resolved - This issue has been resolved. Jun 1, 18:28 UTC Investigating - We are investigating elevated errors on requests to Claude Sonnet 4.6. We will provide an update as soon as possible.

item.title: IntraShuffler: A Privacy Preserving Framework for Heterogeneous DP Federated Learning
item.description: Heterogeneous Differential Privacy (HDP) in Federated Learning (FL) allows clients to select individual privacy budgets ($\varepsilon_i$) according to institutional policies and data sensitivity. In practice, many HDP-FL systems employ $\varepsilon$-aware server aggregation to improve model utility...

item.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
item.description: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting...

item.title: Decreased ChatGPT availability for Free users
item.description: Status: ResolvedThe issue is resolved.Affected components Conversations (Operational)

item.title: Monitoring Agentic Systems Before They're Reliable
item.description: Agentic systems entering production typically operate as partially integrated assemblies where structural defects, not task-level errors, dominate the failure landscape. At this maturity level, task-level error detection may be infeasible: structural failure modes mask the signal that task-level...
